ddls:
CREATE TABLE "devices" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model name of the device (e.g., iPhone XS, Galaxy Note 9) */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the device in CAD */,
  "processor_speed" REAL /* Processor speed of the device in GHz */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the device in GB */,
  "rear_camera_resolution" INTEGER /* Rear camera resolution of the device in MP */,
  "battery_capacity" INTEGER /* Battery capacity of the device in mAh */,
  "front_camera_resolution" INTEGER /* Front camera resolution of the device in MP */,
  "operating_system" TEXT /* Operating system of the device (e.g., iOS, Android) */,
  "screen_size" REAL /* Size of the screen in inches */,
  "ram_capacity" INTEGER /* RAM capacity of the device in GB */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color options available for the device */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date when the device was released */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the device in grams */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "manufacturers" (
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manufacturer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the manufacturer (e.g., Apple, Samsung) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Contact email of the manufacturer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the manufacturer */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the manufacturer */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the manufacturer was founded */,
  "ceo" TEXT /* Name of the CEO of the manufacturer */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Location of the headquarters */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manufacturer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the region (e.g., North America, Europe) */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the region is located */,
  "time_zone" TEXT /* Time zone of the region */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used in the region */,
  "population" TEXT /* Population of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device being sold */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region where the device was sold */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date when the device was sold */,
  "units_sold" INTEGER /* Number of units sold */,
  "sale_channel" TEXT /* Channel through which the sale was made (e.g., online, retail) */,
  "promotion_code" TEXT /* Promotion code used for the sale */,
  "discount_amount" REAL /* Discount amount applied to the sale */,
  "tax_amount" REAL /* Tax amount applied to the sale */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount of the sale including discounts and taxes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_manufacturer" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device */,
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manufacturer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id", "manufacturer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, sales manager) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytic */,
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sale */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device being sold */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region where the device was sold */,
  "units_sold" INTEGER /* Number of units sold */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Revenue generated from the sale */,
  "average_sale_price" REAL /* Average sale price of the device in the region */,
  "profit_margin" REAL /* Profit margin for the sale */,
  "sales_trend" TEXT /* Trend of sales (e.g., increasing, decreasing) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_sale_id FOREIGN KEY ("sale_id") REFERENCES sales ("sale_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_warehouse" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sale */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device being sold */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region where the device was sold */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date when the device was sold */,
  "units_sold" INTEGER /* Number of units sold */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., online store, retail store) */,
  "data_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data was recorded */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_warehouse_sale_id FOREIGN KEY ("sale_id") REFERENCES sales ("sale_id")
)
